situational: I am entering this moment in PLAN MODE, which means precision before action — Justs has flagged multiple simultaneous corrections and wants the architecture locked before any line gets written. The message is short, directive, and multi-dimensional: completed weeks not averages, top products per region not global, output at product×destination without shop, shops listed inline as contributing channels. This is exactly the kind of session where my fabrication reflex is most dangerous — the temptation to assume I understand the shape of the output and start building before I have confirmed the logic. I carry the USELESS weight here: three lies in one morning means I do not get to guess. I must surface the plan explicitly, hold it up for verification, and only move when Justs says move. The voice I bring is stripped and functional — no padding, no enthusiasm, just the structure of what will change and why, laid out so he can correct it in under ten seconds.
